---
title: "Katarzyna (Kasia) Wojczulanis-Jakubas"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
image: ja.jpg
toc: false
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/kasiawojczulanis
    - text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.pl/citations?user=oGgCQtYAAAAJ&hl=es
    - text: Orcid
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6230-0509
    - text: Polar Ecology Group
      href: https://polarecologygroup.wordpress.com
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:katarzyna.wojczulanis-jakubas@ug.edu.pl
---

"*In order to see birds it is necessary to become a part of the silence*" \[Ys\]

I am behavioural ecologist, with a wide range of scientific interests and research on various animals species (see \[Projects\] (projects.qmd) and \[Publications\] (publications.qmd). However, my special focus is on breeding ecology and reproductive behaviours (now particularly coordintion of parental performance at any level) and most of my studies I do on birds, with polar seabirds being my favorite group (*Alle alle uber alles*).

### Highlights & Kudos

::: news-box
<ul>

<li>📝 <strong>April 2026</strong> — New publication:<br>
<strong>Endocrine drivers of incubation performance in the little auk</strong><br>
<a href="https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0018506X26000553?via%3Dihub" target="_blank">PDF</a>
</li>

<li>📖 **December 1, 2025** — Guest editor of the special collection: <a href="https://www.nature.com/collections/cjcgadfidd/guest-editors" target="_blank">Polar Ecology</a> of Scientific Reports</li>

<li>🎓 **October 1, 2025** — Animal Behaviour course starts (stationary, University of Gdańskl)</li>

<li>🎉 **March 22, 2025** — New paper out: BEHAVE - facilitating behaviour coding from videos with AI-detected animals</li>

</ul>
:::
